content: One hand rests on her pistol, the other idly fidgeting near the knife at her belt. She spits on the floor, then grins, teeth sharp and crooked. Skrap Rat: Place reeks of sex ‘n’ death. Can’t walk five steps without some slag beggin’ for a punt or a bullet. Gentry prolly suckin’ each other off in Westminster while we pick through the scraps. Tell me, Boaty—you ever get a taste of one of them Tower whores? Heard they take rad-cocks an’ beg for more. Boaty: Though I did witness a Super Mutant and a Feral engaging in… vigorous congress by the Blackfriars ruins last moon.Oho!

Skrap Rat: Fucking hell, that mutant must’ve ripped her in half by the end. Saw a Tommy pay a ghoul for a suck once—tossed a bullet in its head after. Cunt probably came harder from the kill than the blow.  This city’s a meat grinder. Best fucking show in the Commonwealth. Boaty: Aye, and the blood just keeps the wheels turning. Someone’s always getting fucked, one way or another.
